TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_tamih
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e a ira ku mi e lituday tu haci nu lusay.
S.PHON: ə a ira ku mi ə ɾituɬ~ɮaj tu ħaʦi nu ɾusaj.
S.FORM: e a ira ku mi e lituday tu haci nu lusay.
S.PHON: ə a ira ku mi ə ɾituɬ~ɮaj tu ħaʦi nu ɾusaj.
S.TRANSL: 有一位去摘水果.
There was a person who was plucking fruit.

S.FORM: ta sao'puen nuya a wawa kuya haci nu lusay a pakalic i kuliciw.
S.PHON: ta sao~uʡpuən nuja a wawa kuja ħaʦi nu ɾusaj a pakaɾiʦ i kuɾiʦiw.
S.FORM: ta sao'puen nuya a wawa kuya haci nu lusay a pakalic i kuliciw.
S.PHON: ta sao~uʡpuən nuja a wawa kuja ħaʦi nu ɾusaj a pakaɾiʦ i kuɾiʦiw.
S.TRANSL: 後來,小孩子把水果集中,放置在腳踏車上.
Then, a child gathered the fruits and put them on the bike.

S.FORM: ta dakawen nira a minukay.
S.PHON: ta ɬ~ɮakawən nira a minukaj.
S.FORM: ta dakawen nira a minukay.
S.PHON: ta ɬ~ɮakawən nira a minukaj.
S.TRANSL: 他騎著回家.
He rode home.

S.FORM: tangasa i fatad nu lalan mastul nu ccay a kuliciw kuya wawa.
S.PHON: taŋasa i fataɬ~ɮ nu ɾaɾan mastuɾ nu ʦʦaj a kuɾiʦiw kuja wawa.
S.FORM: tangasa i fatad nu lalan mastul nu ccay a kuliciw kuya wawa.
S.PHON: taŋasa i fataɬ~ɮ nu ɾaɾan mastuɾ nu ʦʦaj a kuɾiʦiw kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 到一半的路程,小孩被另一部腳踏車撞倒.
On his way, another bike hit the child.

S.FORM: mapulin cingra ta malaklak kuya haci nu lusay.
S.PHON: mapuɾin ʦiŋra ta maɾakɾak kuja ħaʦi nu ɾusaj.
S.FORM: mapulin cingra ta malaklak kuya haci nu lusay.
S.PHON: mapuɾin ʦiŋra ta maɾakɾak kuja ħaʦi nu ɾusaj.
S.TRANSL: 他跌倒,然後水果散落一地.
He fell down, and then the fruits were scattered all over.

S.FORM: maduka' ku wa'ay ningra.
S.PHON: maɬ~ɮukaʡ ku waʡaj niŋra.
S.FORM: maduka' ku wa'ay ningra.
S.PHON: maɬ~ɮukaʡ ku waʡaj niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳受傷.
His foot was wounded.

S.FORM: na nuya malitmuh nu tatuluay a tamdaw cingra ta paluwadhantu cingra.
S.PHON: na nuja maɾitmuħ nu tatuɾuaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra ta paɾuwaɬ~ɮħantu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: na nuya malitmuh nu tatuluay a tamdaw cingra ta paluwadhantu cingra.
S.PHON: na nuja maɾitmuħ nu tatuɾuaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra ta paɾuwaɬ~ɮħantu ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候,有三個人與他交會,把他扶起來.
At that time, he met three people, who raised him to his feet.

S.FORM: ta padangentu nu u tatuluay cingra ta pakalicen i kuliciw.
S.PHON: ta paɬ~ɮaŋəntu nu u tatuɾuaj ʦiŋra ta pakaɾiʦən i kuɾiʦiw.
S.FORM: ta padangentu nu u tatuluay cingra ta pakalicen i kuliciw.
S.PHON: ta paɬ~ɮaŋəntu nu u tatuɾuaj ʦiŋra ta pakaɾiʦən i kuɾiʦiw.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人就幫忙他放上腳踏車.

TRANSL.notes: The three people helped him put (the fruits) on the bike.

S.TRANSL: The three people helped him put on the bike.

S.FORM: ta rumakattu cingra.
S.PHON: ta rumakattu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ta rumakattu cingra.
S.PHON: ta rumakattu ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 然後他就開始走路了.
Then, he walked.

S.FORM: manga'aytu ku rakat ningra.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu ku rakat niŋra.
S.FORM: manga'aytu ku rakat ningra.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu ku rakat niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他走的很順.
He walked smoothly.
